🎀 About This Project

I Love Wallpaper is a personal project built out of a love for cute, aesthetic phone wallpapers. The idea is simple: every great wallpaper deserves two versions — one for your Lock Screen that shows off the full image, and one for your Home Screen that's clean enough for your icons to shine.

Built with vanilla HTML, CSS & JavaScript — no frameworks, no libraries, just pure web tech. Features include paired wallpaper previews, category filtering, search, favorites, and custom image upload.

HTML5 CSS3 Vanilla JS No Framework Mobile First Personal Project

✨ About

🎀 About I Love Wallpaper

I Love Wallpaper is a personal project built purely out of a love for cute, aesthetic phone wallpapers.

Every wallpaper comes as a matched pair — a full Lock Screen version and a zoomed-in Home Screen version. Browse, save your favorites, and download both with one tap.

HTML5 CSS3 Vanilla JS No Framework Mobile First

⚠️ Important Notice

For personal entertainment use only.

All wallpapers on this site are collected from the internet for personal appreciation. They are not for commercial use. If you are the original creator and would like your work removed, please get in touch.

🚫 Do not use these wallpapers for commercial purposes, reselling, or redistribution.

✅ You may download and use them as your personal phone wallpaper for free.

💖 How It Works

🔒 Lock Screen — The original full image, perfect for your lock screen.

🏠 Home Screen — A zoomed-in version of the same image, keeping the main subject center and leaving clean space for your app icons.

Tap any wallpaper to preview both versions, then download whichever you need — or grab both at once!

📤 Upload Your Own

You can upload your own images and the app will automatically generate a matched Lock Screen + Home Screen pair for you to download.

Your uploads stay on your device only — nothing is sent to any server.

How to save to your photos

iPhone: Long press the image above → tap "Add to Photos"

Android: Long press the image above → tap "Download image" or "Save image"

🤖 AndroidLong press image → "Save image"
